target_relation: may improve cold tolerance through reduced

records.title: Abnormal blood viscosity in Raynaud's phenomenon
records.abstract: A 1976 study reported higher low-temperature blood viscosity in participants with Raynaud's phenomenon than in controls.

records.title: The effects of dietary omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acids on erythrocyte membrane phospholipids, erythrocyte deformability and blood viscosity in healthy volunteers
records.abstract: A 1985 study reported that fish-oil omega-3 supplementation increased erythrocyte deformability and reduced whole-blood viscosity in healthy volunteers.

records.title: Controlled study of nifedipine in the treatment of Raynaud's phenomenon
records.abstract: A controlled 1982 study evaluated nifedipine as a treatment for Raynaud's phenomenon.

records.title: Controlled double-blind trial of nifedipine in the treatment of Raynaud's phenomenon
records.abstract: A 1983 double-blind trial directly evaluated nifedipine for Raynaud's phenomenon.

records.title: Calcium entry blocking agents in digital vasospasm (Raynaud's phenomenon)
records.abstract: A 1983 clinical study directly evaluated nifedipine in idiopathic and connective-tissue-associated Raynaud's phenomenon.

records.title: Prostaglandin E1 in severe Raynaud's phenomenon
records.abstract: A 1982 study directly evaluated prostaglandin E1 in severe Raynaud's phenomenon.

records.title: Bone mineral density control record
records.abstract: A negative-control concept with no relation to Raynaud's phenomenon in this frozen pilot corpus.
